description: Write text or binary content to one or more files (creates or overwrites). Each file has its own path, content, and optional type. For binary files, set type='base64;MIME' (e.g. 'base64;image/png'). Supports template variable replacement via 'template' parameter, dry-run preview, automatic backup (.bak), and unified diff output after write. Example: {"files": [{"path": "hello.go", "content": "package main"}]}
name: write_file

content.description: File content. Supports {{var}} template placeholders when 'template' is set.

show_diff.description: Optional. Overrides top-level show_diff for this file. "true"=return unified diff, "stat"=only line stats.

backup.description: Optional. Overrides top-level backup for this file. When true, auto-backup existing file as {path}.bak.

template.description: Optional. Merged with top-level template (file-level wins). Template variables {{var}} in content are replaced.

show_diff.description: Default for all files. "true"=return unified diff, "stat"=only line stats (e.g. '+42行 / -15行').

backup.description: Default for all files. When true, auto-backup existing file as {path}.bak before overwriting.

dry_run.description: Preview mode. When true, does not write to disk. Shows content preview (new file) or diff (existing file).

template.description: Default template variables for all files. Values replace {{varName}} placeholders in content. File-level template merges on top (file-level wins). Example: {"name": "MyApp", "port": 8080}.

format.description: Output format. "text" (default) for human-readable, "json" for structured JSON.
